features.name: OpenCode skill packaging
features.description: Make learn-anything-skill loadable as an OpenCode skill. Register skill path in opencode.json.
features.evidence: opencode.json created with skills.paths: ['skills'] pointing to skills/learn-anything-skill/SKILL.md

features.name: Harness framework (AGENTS.md)
features.description: Add harness-aware sections: startup workflow, definition of done, session rules, end-of-session checklist.
features.evidence: AGENTS.md updated with startup workflow, working rules, definition of done, end of session checklist

features.name: Session continuity (progress.md + feature_list.json)
features.description: Create progress tracking artifacts for session handoff and continuity.
features.evidence: feature_list.json and progress.md created, both valid JSON/Markdown

features.name: SKILL.md description optimization
features.description: Tighten SKILL.md frontmatter description for OpenCode skill listing budget.
features.evidence: Description tightened from ~300 to ~200 chars, front-loaded with trigger keywords

features.name: One-line install (oh-my-openagent pattern)
features.description: Create docs/guide/installation.md and add one-liner copy-paste install to README.
features.evidence: docs/guide/installation.md with human + LLM agent install instructions. README one-liner section.

features.name: README redesign — fork identity + high-aesthetics
features.description: Rewrite README.md and README.en.md with GitHub high-aesthetics template. Add fork notice, badges, emoji sections, collapsible use cases, and OpenCode-native focus.
features.evidence: README.md and README.en.md fully rewritten with shields.io badges, fork banner, collapsible use cases, table-structured comparisons, emoji section markers.
